notes: v0.19.1 — HOTFIX. Fixes black screen after the Grindare Studio intro (v0.19.0 had two parse errors in the new PvP code: stat_nickname → settings_nickname, and aim was Vector2 not float). Adds a floating nickname above your ship (the one you picked at onboarding / in settings); opponent ship in MULTIPLAYER shows their nickname relayed by the server. The rest of v0.19.0 is unchanged: real online 1v1 matchmaking via Helsinki server, same arena + music + beats on both sides.
